_description: GDPR/CNIL opt-out suppression. Every entry here is PERMANENTLY excluded from outbound. Minimum 30-day retention per CNIL guidance; longer is fine. Seeded with AM-locked domains so a bad diff to icp.json can never re-enable outreach to AM-scoped accounts.
_writer: execution/personal_workflows/self_outbound_system/suppression_writer.py (Phase 2, 2026-07-14). Callable as CLI (`py suppression_writer.py --email X --reason negative_reply --source reply_classifier`) or as a library (`add_suppression(email, reason, source)` / `add_bulk(entries)`). Concurrency-safe via config/.suppression.lock file. Idempotent — dup adds are logged in history but not duplicated in emails.
_webhook_worker: execution/infrastructure/self_outbound_webhook_worker/ (Phase 2, 2026-07-14). Receives Instantly webhooks, HMAC-verifies, POSTs to suppression writer + Telegram alert. Deploy via `wrangler deploy` in that dir once operator adds INSTANTLY_WEBHOOK_SECRET + TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID as Worker secrets.
